name: TAITRON COMPONENTS INC
summary: Taitron Components Inc. is a distributor of electronic components, including semiconductors and other electronic parts. The company sources products primarily from manufacturers in Asia and sells to customers in the United States. Taitron focuses on providing off-the-shelf, standard components to OEM customers, contract manufacturers, and distributors, maintaining inventory to fulfill orders efficiently.

products.name: Electronic Components
products.description: Standard off-the-shelf electronic components including semiconductors distributed to OEMs and contract manufacturers.
